Introducing

Welcome to Bingo, where innovation meets opportunity in the world of cryptocurrency!

About

Step into the whimsical universe of Bingo Coin, a crypto adventure that brings the charm of cartoons to the forefront of digital finance. Embark on a playful journey where animated characters and cutting-edge blockchain technology converge to create a one-of-a-kind cryptocurrency experience.

Dive into the world of Bingo, where every transaction is a brushstroke in a colorful narrative, and each block on the chain is a frame in an animated tapestry. Explore the joy of crypto investing with a touch of animated magic – Bingo Coin, where finance meets fantasy!

Community

Welcome to the Bingo Coin Community, a lively gathering of crypto enthusiasts and cartoon aficionados! Here, we’ve built a space where the excitement of cryptocurrency converges with the vibrancy of animated worlds. Join our diverse community of like-minded individuals who share a passion for both financial innovation and the whimsical charm of cartoons.

Whether you’re a seasoned investor or a casual observer, everyone is welcome in our virtual realm of Bingo. Engage in animated discussions, share insights, and embark on this entertaining journey where the thrill of crypto meets the joy of animated storytelling. Together, we’re shaping the future of finance in a playful and inclusive environment. Join the Bingo Coin Community – where crypto meets cartoon, and every member is part of the colorful narrative!

Roadmap

• Get $BINGO trending on twitter with our community power

• Huge Giveaways

• CEX Listings

• BINGO Merch

Phase 4

• 100,000+ holders
• BINGO Meme takeover

How To Buy
Create a Wallet

Download metamask or your wallet of choice from the app store or google play store for free. Desktop users, download the google chrome extension by going to metamask.io.

Create a Wallet

Have ETH in your wallet to switch to $BINGO. If you don’t have any ETH, you can buy directly on metamask, transfer from another wallet, or buy on another exchange and send it to your wallet.

Go to Uniswap

Connect to interact with uniswap inside your Metamask app. Connect your wallet and approve, When Metamask prompts you for a wallet signature, sign.

Click to approve

Switch ETH for $BINGO. We have super low taxes so you don’t need to worry about buying with a specific slippage, although you may need to use slippage during times of market volatility.

$BINGO is a meme cryptocurrency with no intrinsic value or expectation of financial return. There is no formal development team. The coin is community led and for entertainment purposes only.
